meaning: n.身体淡褐色并有白色鬣毛和尾的一种马
examples: Question 4 : In which country did Appaloosa, Palomino, and Pinto horses originate and gain popularity?
In “Who Killed Palomino Molero?” we learn that a police officer’s own sentimental proclivities may be warping his assessment of the prime suspects in the killing of a handsome young singer.
He tends to his eight cats, three dogs, five goats and a palomino horse, named Boss.
The walk from the Colombian town of Palomino to the beach took 15 minutes along a scorching hot dirt road.
His Palomino fund was up 13.3% net of fees through the first half of the year, after sinking 5.09% in 2011.
